series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of applications for investment adviser representative licensure; notices of termination; correspondence; and other materials related to the licensing of investment adviser representatives.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retian in operating area for a period of 5 years from the date of most recent approval, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain securities machine readable records on FileMaker database for 5 years form the date of most recent approval, then destroy by erasure, Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
